name: Brett Butler
bio: Brett Butler is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and writer from the South whose wry working-class comedy earned appearances on The Tonight Show before she starred as the title character in the ABC sitcom Grace Under Fire from 1993 to 1998. She received two Golden Globe nominations for the role and published a memoir, Knee Deep in Paradise, in 1996.

timeline.ev: Television debut on The Tonight Show
Publishes memoir Knee Deep in Paradise

accolades: Two Golden Globe nominations (Grace Under Fire)
Peoples Choice Award, Favorite Female Performer (1994)

specials.t: Brett Butler: The Child Aint Right

bits.t: Brett Butler at Just For Laughs 1994
